---
title: "Topics"
---

:::{.page-intro}
Hai cum noi dung chinh cua blog la toan va AI, voi nhan manh vao cac bai viet giai thich bang truc giac.
:::

:::{.feature-grid}
:::{.feature-card}
## Toan

- Phan tich
- Dai so tuyen tinh
- Xac suat
- Toan cho machine learning
:::

:::{.feature-card}
## AI

- Neural networks
- Optimization
- Representation learning
- Truc quan hoa mo hinh
:::

:::{.feature-card}
## Media

- Hinh minh hoa
- Animation bang Manim
- Do thi va diagram
- Ghi chu ky thuat
:::
:::
